channel.title: Tech Layoffs on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Tech Layoffs on MinWeb

item.title: Why Your Survival Shouldn’t Be Tied to Your Paycheck
item.description: Discover why relying on employer-provided benefits creates dangerous instability and explore the historical context of tying your survival to your paycheck.

item.title: The Hidden Cost of Job-Linked Benefits: A Tragic Case Study
item.description: The tragic story of a terminally ill employee losing his benefits reveals the dangerous instability of tying essential health and life insurance to employment.

item.title: Why Tim Sweeney’s Comments on Epic Layoffs Sparked Backlash
item.description: Explore why Tim Sweeney’s comments on Epic Games' layoffs triggered industry backlash and what the reaction reveals about leadership and modern talent...
